Sandbox_SurvivorLootRespawn_LootRespawnT: How container loot respawn chance is computed over time. Vanilla disables this mod and falls back to the base game's loot respawn behavior. Exponential uses the curve f(t) = B + (M - B) * (b^t - 1) / (b^T - 1), where t is game hours since the container was last looted, T is the game hours till max respawn chance, M is the max respawn chance, B is the min respawn chance, and b is the curve steepness.
Sandbox_SurvivorLootRespawn_HoursTillMax: Game hours till max loot respawn chance
Game hours after a container is looted before the per-roll respawn chance reaches its maximum value. T in the curve formula. Must be greater than the container quiet period.
Sandbox_SurvivorLootRespawn_MaxRespawnCh: Maximum per-roll percent chance a container respawns its loot once its respawn timer fully matures. M in the curve formula. Must be higher than the min loot respawn chance.
Sandbox_SurvivorLootRespawn_MinRespawnCh: Floor per-roll percent chance a container respawns loot once the quiet period has ended. B in the curve formula. Set to 0 to disable any chance of early respawns.
Sandbox_SurvivorLootRespawn_ContainerQui: Game hours after a container is looted during which no respawn can occur. Set to 0 to allow respawns immediately at the min chance. Must be lower than the game hours till max loot respawn chance.
Sandbox_SurvivorLootRespawn_CurveSteepne: Base of the exponential in the respawn curve f(t) = B + (M - B) * (b^t - 1) / (b^T - 1). Values close to 1 produce a near-linear ramp; higher values back-load the curve (very low chance for most of T, sharp rise near the max-time mark). 1.05 gives a moderate back-loaded curve.
